docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2016 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT F.FERRANDO & CO.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,705.00 FILED BY EJTEMAEI, POOYA AS TO DEFENDANT F.FERRANDO & CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-08-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF EJTEMAEI, POOYA AS TO DEFENDANT F.FERRANDO & CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EJTEMAEI, POOYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT F.FERRANDO & CO. $1,640.37 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,705.37 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-08-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-08-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY SHAWN MCCAULEY--FOREMAN. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT F.FERRANDO & CO.
